ablation_results.conclusion: Workspace and no-workspace perform equivalently (~-0.85 eval). Workspace does not yet show measurable benefit because the current single-goal task lacks competing priorities. Architecture is ready for Stages 5+ where multi-goal conflicts will exercise it.

last_training_run.name: ablation-workspace
last_training_run.notes: Workspace ablation: no clear benefit on single-goal task, architecturally sound

known_issues: Global workspace shows no measurable benefit yet — needs multi-goal scenarios to validate
next_actions: Plan and implement Stage 5: Self-Model — distinguish self-caused from external events
Stage 5 may create the competing priorities that exercise the workspace
Expose workspace attention weights in web UI (lower priority)

completed_stages.0: Embodied sandbox — env, agent, reward, logging
completed_stages.1: Homeostatic organism — reflexes, actor-critic, TD learning
completed_stages.2: Predictive control — world model, surprise signal, sleep consolidation
completed_stages.3: Partial observability and memory — episodic recall, validated via ablation
completed_stages.4: Global Workspace — architecturally complete, benefit pending multi-goal tasks
